_instructions: Translate each text into: sr (Serbian Latin with čćžšđ), sr_cyrl (Serbian Cyrillic), en (English), ru (Russian), de (German), tr (Turkish). Return same structure with translations filled in.

reviews.text: Lassan egy hónapja történt a balesetem. Elmentünk egy hajótúrára a barátnőmmel Kotorban és megálltunk egy öbölben, mi pedig levetkőztünk és megmártóztunk. Vagyis ez volt a terv. Leléptem a hajó első lépcsőfokára a bal lábammal, aztán a jobbal egy lentebbi lépcsőfokra, majd konstatáltam, hogy beszorult a bal lábujjam és annyira szorítja valami, hogy nem bírom kihúzni. Megijedtem, elkezdtem rángatni (utólag jó nagy barom voltam), aztán végül sikerült, beleestem a vízbe, úsztam egyet. Nem éreztem semmilyen fájdalmat, nem tudtam hogy ekkora a gáz. Visszamentünk a hajóra és csak annyit láttam, hogy ömlik a vér a körömágyamból és valami elvágta félbe a lábujjamat. Akkor kötöttem ki itt az ambulancián. Azonnal ellátott két fiatalabb hölgy, nagyon kedvesek voltak, segítőkészek, nyugtattak, hogy ne essek pánikba és profin összevarrták a sebet. 10/10!😎

Just my personal experience. I had a bad food poisoning and I think my body was so exhausted that I developed anxiety, dehydration and couldn’t sleep because of tremor and high heart rate.

I went to this clinic at 1am Monday, hoping for some UV, and doctors were just leaving with someone in a critical condition. They asked me what happened and said come tomorrow morning with that, we’re leaving.

I don’t think there should be only one available doctor at the emergency department. And of course I hope that woman is okay 🙏🏻
Izuzetno ljubazno osoblje, a posebne pohvale za doktorku Gordanu Popović

Had an overall good experience. Went for a tetanus shot, the receptionist was ok, sent me to the doctor, the doctor was quite nice too. Both spoke some English (I speak a little Montenegrin). The doctor gave me prescription for vaccination, the nurse was nice and the injections weren’t painful. So I’d say everything went even better than I thought. I spent less than an hour, paid about 50 euros (the doctor’s consultation + vaccine itself)

Девојка и ја смо добили тровање храном боравећи у Херцег Новом у јулу 2024. године, нисмо имали здравствено осигурање. Екипа Дома здравља Котор нам је пружила прву помоћ и дала нам инфузију. Од велике помоћи су били. Хвала им на томе до неба.
Katastrofa više radnika nego pacijenata sve se čeka od 2h do 5h

Mon expérience à 3h du matin dans cette hopital a été merveilleuse.
Je suis venu pour une intoxication alimentaire et la prise en charge a été rapide ( après avoir chercher l'hopitale pendant 2h avec la madame du 112 qui ne parlait pas anglais et qui nous engueulais).
Après m'avoir dit d'etre un homme et d'assumer de pas avoir attendu le matin pour venir elle ma fait 3 piqure (une raté) et m'a jetée de l'eau a la gueule pour empécher le malaise vagale.
Au final on est bien dans les balkan je mattendais pas a plus ou moins.
J'espere que la medecin qui ma raté la piqure dans le muscle s'est améliorée depuis.
Expérience à vivre une fois dans sa vie.

TR&ENG Review
Eşek arısı soktu ve alerji sonucu baldırımın arkası olduğu gibi şişip kızardı. Kotor şehir hastanesinde hap al merhem sür diyip gönderdiler. Gece dayanılmaz hale geldi ve haritadan başka hangi hastane var bakıp buraya gittik. Kötü yorumların aksine acil ekibi çok yardımsever ve çözüm odaklıydı - hatta doktor hanım Türkçe de biliyordu. Gereki iğneleri yaptılar ve tatilimin kalanı onların sayesinde rahat geçti. Kötü yorumlar belki iletişim eksikliğidir, belki de hizmet ekipten ekibe değişiyordur, bilemiyorum.

NOT: Türkçe yorumlarda hem bu hastane hem de diğer bütün Karadağ lokasyonları için gördüğüm genel bir eleştiri var, kabalıktan şikayet ediliyor ve bu ırkçılığa yoruluyor. Tabi haklı oldukları yerler olabilir. Ama genel gördüğüm kadarıyla Karadağlılar öyle ekstra güleryüzlü değil ve direkt iletişim kuruyor - milliyetten bağımsız. Birbirlerine karşı da öyleler. Yerli-yabancı tüm turistlere karşı fazla konuksever bir kültürden gelen biz Türkler için bu çok yabancı, kişisel algılanabiliyor.

I was stung by a wasp, and due to an allergic reaction, the back of my calf became completely swollen and red. At Kotor City Hospital, they just told me to take a pill and apply some cream, then sent me home. By night, the pain became unbearable, so we checked the map and went to this hospital. Contrary to the bad reviews, the emergency team there was very helpful and solution-oriented — the doctor even spoke Turkish! They gave me the necessary injections, and thanks to them, I was able to enjoy the rest of my holiday comfortably. The negative reviews might be due to communication issues or differences between medical teams, I’m not sure.

NOTE: In Turkish reviews, I’ve seen a common criticism not only about this hospital but also other locations across Montenegro — people often complain about rudeness and interpret it as racism. There may, of course, be cases where that’s true. But from what I’ve generally observed, Montenegrins aren’t particularly warm or smiley; they tend to communicate directly, regardless of nationality. They’re the same way with each other, too. For us Turks, who come from a culture that’s very warm and hospitable toward guests, this can feel quite foreign and even personal.
Odlična ekipa. Stigli za 2 minuta, brzo shvatili situaciju i efikasno reagovali. Čestitam na znanju, sugestijama i izvršenju. Prijatno sam iznenađen kako služba 124 radi. Primer za druge.

Ne razumijem vecinu ovih negativnih komentara. To da neko iz Srbije ili druge drzave nije imao isti tretman
je laz. I sama sam dosta puta licno dovodila strance u hitnu, kod raznih
doktora i uvijek su svi bili normalni.
Doktori/ce i osoblje naseg Doma zdravlja nisu rasisti i ako vam kazu
da nemaju tu vakcunu, onda je
sigurno nemaju. Uvijek su na usluzi
u okviru svojih mogucnosti.
Imaju znanje, svi su vrlo ljubazni, divni i profesionalni, pocevsi od direktorice pa na dalje.  Kotoranka
Such a disrespectful, angry, Serbia is many times better, no matter if you are a tourist or a local.
I dont get the negative reviews, come early you'll get good attention and i go here anytime i have something

Удобно расположена сразу у дороги и остановки. Чисто и просторно. Очереди у стойки регистрации нет. Долго не ждали приема. Доктор общей практики приняла быстро и сразу сориентировалась, что от нее хочу. Написала что нужно и отправила куда следует. Кажется , опытная. Эффектная дама. Приятная. Сдержанная. Внимательная. Поход оцениваю положительно и с пользой. На стойке регистрации молодые немного тупили не могла сообразить. Послали к опытной и она  все разрулила.

Najgora ustanova u kojoj sam bila. Vec 2 nedelje mucim problem sa stomakom, a kada sam im se javila rekli su mi da se ne bave tim problemima i da oni nisu ustanova za to. Ako cemo tako, zasto se zovete DOM ZDRAVLJA? Sramota.

Irkçı ve ezik insanlar. Saygısızca konuşup üstüne  bize nereli olduğumuzu sorup Türk olduğumuzu söyleyince burada ve karadağın hiç bir yerinde kuduz aşısının bulunmadığını söyledi sayıgısız tavırlarla. Hastaneye gelen bi hastanın nereli olduğunu sormak? Üstüne doktorların ve sağlık hizmetinde çalışanları hipokrat yemini nereye uçtu? Hiç bir işe yaramayan insanlar.

Worst experience ever
If you want to feel neglected and powerless us a patient so this is the place
But let me describe my experience with facts:
On August 10 (it was Sunday) I came with small problem and basically I needed from them only information is it bad or it can wait or what to do. So it was a small furuncle on my belly and I’ve never had any so I didn’t know that it shouldn’t be touched etc. It was hurting about 3 days and I started to worry that I could had an infection or something.
Our flight was in one day so despite Sunday I’ve decided that it better to find someone to check it.
Everything was closed except this place
And don’t get me wrong - 1 ⭐️ is for receiving some help but the way it was provided…
So I came to the Emergency and showed them my belly with something that later they called “not the problem with what you should come on Sunday” but for some reason instead of telling me that it’s nothing serious or instructions for proper self help they introduced me to the therapist who started to  point on my face (I have food allergies and there was 3 small wounds after that) and that other things that she said:
- I see you never been at the skin doctor
- is your menstruation is soon?(it’s not)
- I see u have a skin problem maybe it’s the same (it’s definitely not even if it was acne)
All the way she act like that and not even ask me if I tried to do something before or when it’s happened (after what) or do I have allergies. No. She saw my face and everything became absolutely clear to her. But should I also remind that I’m not from here and came not for treatment plan but for basic help with wound? The only person in the room who was staying professional was the nurse to whom I’m very grateful. Any way all of that questions were asked while I was lying on the cabinet sofa and she were pointing a needle in that thing.
After everything was over I was crying and told my friend (who drove us there) that they were really rude. She came to them and told that this is not the way you treat people.
So the doctor came and instead of talking to me or apologizing she just told my friend that I didn’t understand her because “lost in translation” (I understood her perfectly) and she didn’t tell me I was fat (she didn’t… but she told it to my friend) it’s just happened in my “fat area” (she didn’t told me anything about the case) and she just have to ask about my face because it was also spot…etc
Not one word of apology to me
She didn’t even try to speak to me
She spoke with third person in front me and my husband.
And after that they said that I should be grateful that they even treated me because normally with my problem they didn’t…So what? If u just told me it’s nothing serious and leave me be - it’s also fine. But you sawn my problem and decided to treat it.
Also at some point of conversation with our friend (we standing next to her) that doctor decided that the case that she looks young(she is not) and I neglected her because of that… But the thing is that I didn’t had that thought in my mind neither to tell something like that to her. I came for help and I trusted the doctor and she totally neglected me.
Never ever I would recommend this place and I feel sorry for people who will be in her care
Nurse was good though

The female receptionist was incredibly disrespectful, behaving in a manner completely inappropriate for someone working in healthcare. When we said we would pay in cash, instead of simply stating that she couldn’t provide change, she slammed the desk, shouted, and left her chair. If my medical condition hadn’t been so urgent, I would have left the hospital immediately. I’m sharing this incident as a heads-up for future patients who may come to the emergency department. Think twice.
Front desk was unprofessional, unmotivated. Waited one hour no doctor showed up. Don’t go here.
Sramotno. Kazu koleginica radi od 8h, 8.20 jos nije na poslu. Kada bi imali Malo postovanja prema nama samima a potom I prema pacijentima mozda bi I bilo bolje.

I wanted to leave a review because I’m reading the very negative reviews from visitors, and I have to say my experience was far different (for good). I fell on the ice on a run and it was very bad. My back. I was scared—in so much pain—and although it was indeed quite a long wait—the staff (front desk and doctor) were very kind and gentle with me. Grateful.

If you want to feel discriminated just because you are not Montenegrin, come to this hospital. Just because I speak English, I couldn't get to see the doctor who will wirte me just a simple prescription. And now I feel worse than I came in. Very rude nurse at the reception, hope to never see you again!

Terrible experience. One main front desk girl faked like she did not know english while responding in english. I had blood coming out from the intestines and could be pretty serious, but they did not care. They told me to wait at one door, the doctor did not recieve me and other went in front. Asked what was going on and she in a very arrogant way sent me to another doctor. Would not recommend at all

Bezobrazluk cisti. Dosla sam iz drugog grada da radim i nemam prilike da odem da zavrsim tamo. Dolazila sam dva dana za redom da zamolim "doktoricu" da mi izda uput za nalaze u bolnicu Kotor, i dva dana su me vratili tako bezobrazno. Cekamo nekoliko nas 40 min i vise za jednostavnu stvar koja traje 3min, i ona izlazi i govori kako nema vremena za sve ove koji su dosli za upute i preglede..Na kraju sam otisla privatno jer nije vrijedno pokusavati da zavrsite nesto u ovoj ustanovi.

Jednostavno užas, ako želite išta da uradite bolje idite privatno, jer ovde vas dočekuju kao da ste došli iz inata, doktorka bele kose  nadrndana 24/7 i neljubzna ,pa pobogu niko nije kriv sto mu nažalost vi trebate. Daleko ste vi od doktora. Da sam na vašem mestu sramota bi me bilo svoju platu da uzmem. Ugledajte se malo na koleginice za pultom, devojke maksimalno ljubazne i od pomoci.

Excellent experience.  Clean and modern , and doctor and nurses very polite and pleasant, and spoke English well. I went there for a tetanus shot, and saw the doctor quickly. Cost was reasonable, only 50 Euro.

Neljubaznost, drskost i bahatost od strane dežurne sestre na šalteru prijema dana 27.06.2024 .  u popodnevnim časovima .Uvodjenje pacjenata preko reda a na osnovu poznanstva sa dotičnom medicinskom sestrom koja radi na pultu prijema pacijenata . Sramota za Zdravstvo Crne Gore . Sto mladji kadar to bahatije ponašanje . Dokle vise veze i vezice , i još treba da ćutiš jer zaboga misle da si iz dosadei da prekratis vrijeme  u Dom Zdravlja a ne iz potrebe.

Ako ste medicinska sestra "imacete pravo" proci pored svih zakazanih I svoj problem staviti na prvo mjesto . Nije vas briga da li pacijenti zakazani sa bolovima cekaju u redu.Vi ste prioritet po svim pitanjima osim etickim medicinskim.
Sestre na salteru su profesionalne. Doktorica Djonovic jako  profesionalna.

اسلوبهم مخيس ولا يعرفون انقليزي الا وحده منهم ويحبون العلوم مخلينا واحنى تعبانين طايحين ورايحين يسمعون سوالف مريضه ثانيه .. يعاملونك كنه على حسابهم واحنى دافعين .. واول مره اشوف درب يخلص بالسرعه الفائقه الي هم خلصوني فيها 🙂 ولا جاء ٥ دقايق
Sve pohvale za epidemijlosku sluzbu, doktorica Jelena Pajcin jako ljubazna, fina i profesionalna, med.sestra i tehnicar takodje jako fini. Pozitivno iznenadjen.

Ich bin an diesem Ort von einem Lungenfacharzt behandelt worden ich muss sagen ich war sehr zufrieden mit dem ganzen Ablauf mit allen Schwestern und Ärzten. Danke für die hervorragende Leistung ich fühlte mich immer in guten Händen. Danke an die Damen in der Infusionsabteilung . Auch die zwei Ärzte in der Aufnahme,  die mich als erstes behandelt haben,einfach klasse. Man muss auch nicht als Tourist zu dort ansässigen Privatärzten  gehen, meine Erfahrung zeigt mir, dass auch dort keine andere Behandlung stattfindet. Ich fühlte mich schon bei manchen richtig abgezockt, weil sie wissen, dass man in Deutschland wahrscheinlich das Geld zurück bekommt.
Non

Excellent and efficient medical centre. I went for an orthopaedic issue and the female doctor, the nurses and receptionists were all very gentle, reassuring, warm and had a calming bedside manner. I had put off coming in for months because I was absolutely terrified of what Montenegro’s health system would be like, yet was extremely relieved with how pleasant it was. It acts as a medical centre and hospital in one place, with various floors for different departments. Also, don’t be discouraged  by the exterior facade of the building—inside is actually very modern and comforting. For foreigners coming from countries with good public healthcare systems, you will feel at ease with their service provision and facilities. Thank you to the staff.

Ich hatte zu wenig Herztabletten bei und der Rückflug wurde gestrichen. Also zog ich los, mir neue zu besorgen. Die 1.Lardiologie gab es nicht mehr,Fehler google oder?,die nächsten 2 Anläufe waren umsonst,aber weiter geholfen wurde mir auch nicht. Diese Klinik, Vordereingang unbedingt benutzen,war dann endlich sehr hilfsbereit. Auch wenn sie mir erklären mussten,ein rezeptpflichtiges Medikament in Deutschland ist hier frei verkäuflich. Ich wurde zu zwei Apotheken begleitet und ich bekam mein Medikament. Danke an den Empfang.
staff does not speak english.  This is the tourist area.  interesting

Byliśmy z dwuletnim dzieckiem z zapaleniem gardła. Lekarz oraz panie recepcjonistki bardzo miłe, bardzo pomocni. Podstawowa znajomość angielskiego ale udało się dogadać bez problemu. Koszt wizyty u pediatry 30 EUR.

Przybyliśmy trochę przez przypadek, bo kto zakłada pobyt w takim miejscu na wakacjach. Mąz został pogryziony przez bliżej nie określone coś . I trzeba było to sprawdzić na wejściu pielęgniarka niestety nie komunikowała się w innym języku niż swój. Ale pan ochroniarz pomógł. Zabrał dowód i poszli. Czekaliśmy ok 40min na lekarza. Pani doktor bardzo miła i pomocna wypisała receptę i powiedziała jak postępować w języku angielskim. Miejsce wygląda na świeżo wyremontowane. Jeśli jest potrzeba warto przyjść. Rachunek dostaliśmy na niecałe 30 euro
Na pedijatriji veoma korektno osoblje, čisto, uredno, novo. Sve pohvale

Sestra na ulazu je bila od maksimalne pomoći i pokazala veliku empatiju i pomoć. Lekarka kao i svugde se malo dvoumila ali nam je kasnije izašla u susret i pomogla. Nažalost, čeka se prilično dugo, oko 2 sata i to nekada napolju ispod suncobrana na 38+ stepeni

Очень приятная небольшая больница, ремонт свежий, есть разные врачи и разные услуги. Прохождение обследования для внж не заняло много времени. Сотрудники вежливы. С более серьезным обследованием пока не сталкивалась и надеюсь, что не столкнусь:)
Ponosna sam na nas Dom zdravlja.
The cleanest and most organized Medical institution in Montenegro. Staff can be a bit edgy but at the end staff is profetional and good.

Сдавали тест пцр. Приехали к 7:30, очередь стояли до 9:30, сдали бесплатно. Паспорт там копируют, оплата налога отеля по факту не спросили. С собой была распечатка от букинга,ее мельком глянул охранник, но если бы ее не показали , никто бы и не спросил. Результат забрать можно там же после 17:00

What to do, if you want a free PCR here:
- you need to take the queue at 6am, no later
- they starting make PCR for MNE citizens out of turn from 8-9am
- be careful, because you can conflict with locals due to the confusion in the queue between locals vs foreigners

We have waited from 7am till 10:40am for a free PCR.
Записались заранее и приехали ровно в  7 утра. Уже была большая очередь. Пцр сдали только в 11. Всех местных необходимо пропускать без очереди

Got a free PCR test here. Bring your passport and your proof of tourist tax (your accomodation should provide this to you)

1) Turn up anywhere between 6-8am. Earlier the better but there’s no line system
2) Security will take your passport with around 10 others at a time. It will be returned with a photocopy.
3) Line up, there’s only one testing station. We waited around 90 minutes.
4) Hand over your passport copy & tourist tax receipt. Get tested - it was gentle and they were friendly.
5) Head back the next day same time for your results.

Rumours said it was available the same day, we went 3 times and our results weren’t ready, but maybe if you mention it at testing it’ll be ok. You are given a printed PCR test which is accepted & checked at the border control.

Došli smo na COVID testiranje 10 minuta do 07 sati, testiranje je trebalo početi u 7,30, krenulo je 15 minuta kasnije, na red smo tek stigli u 9 sati.
Prednost imaju domaći državljani.
Usluga je spora i ne organizirana.

Я не знаю, какое качество медицинских услуг в этом центре, но для того, чтобы сдать тест на covid, нам, туристам, надо прибыть в 7:30 утра, записаться и стать в очередь. Сообщаю это всем, кому это необходимо. А мы прибыли в 9:30, нам сказали, что только завтра с утра мы можем сделать тест, и будет он готов в 17 часов. Очень не удобно. Пришлось ехать в частную лабораторию, где тест стоит 49 евро.
Je déconseille fortement cet établissement ! Personnel soignant incompétent et inhospitalier...

The hospital offers free covid tests to tourists. For that, you need to arrive between 7:30 and 8:30 and get in the line. Locals from Montenegro will get preference on the line. You will need to show a receipt that your hotel payed the tourism fee, don’t forget to print it and also bring your passport. Results are ready in the same day, but due to the line is better to pick it up at 7:30pm or on the next day.
Na zakazan termin smo cekali red, a sestra na prijemu je objsnila da je to zbog nedostatka  ljekara.

COVID  tests are performed free of charge for tourists
There is a line  outside and you  have to wait in the sun for two and a half hours
The results arrive on the evening of the same day and can only be given on physical arrival at the hospital
Which of course is especially nonsense in 2021
Not an easy experience
Zvala sam iz Budve. Moram da pohvalim ljubaznost osoblja koje se javilo na telefon i uputilo me na najljubazniji moguci nacin. 10 👍👌 …

Невнимательное, непрофессионально е обсуживание.Пытались сделать тест на корону.Персонал опоздал на час!!! Создалась огромная очередь,секретарша всех переписывает в журнале от руки и это 21 век.Требуют послать копии документов по емайл и еще привезти копии с собой!!!!

One of the best services I have ever had in my life, very polite, caring and friendly staff.
A big hug to all the staff at the Medical Centre Kotor :-)

Zgrada je uredno uređena i ljekari rade uredno. Ne čeka se mnogo, međurim na prijemnom pultu zastoj česti. Oni imaju Dell kompjutere, al tu ima zastojs. Očigledno medicinske sestre nedovoljo obučene ka Pc. Sve je jako čisto,

Went on a Sunday to emergency with breathing problems, staff were amazing, friendly and extremely helpful. The Doctor and male nurse on duty were beyond amazing. Taking into consideration what they have to work with they do their utmost best..5 stars from me !!

Приехали ночью с ребенком с приступом аллергии. Весёлый молодой доктор быстро и профессионально осмотрел, оказал помощь, назначил лечение. Спросили паспорт, денег за лечение не просили. Спасибо, добрые люди! )))

Pratila sam prije par veceru pacijenta koji je kao hitan slucaj dosao u hitnu sluzbu. Sa ljubaznoscu i profesionalniscu dr. Cobaja sam se toliko odusevila da sam osjetila potrebu da ga javmo pohvalim.
Perce vivo vicino
Imao sam zdravstvenih problema i zavrsio sam u ovoj ustanovi... Pregled mi je obavljen brzo i profesionalno... Svaka cast za osoblje!
